assessments.rationale: Product is certified to EN 179/EN 1125. Standard commercial office operating conditions. Constraint pre-satisfied by product design.
The sole absolute constraint is pre-satisfied by the mechanical-primary architecture. Alarm activates at 0V by design.
Large-floor-plate office towers and concrete cores can reduce effective RF range below 30m. Standard repeater infrastructure resolves this at low cost.
assessments.mitigation: Pre-deployment RF survey; Deploy signal repeaters; Use BUS Gateway to aggregate floor-level receivers

assessments.rationale: Commercial office emergency exits have very low door-event frequency. 2-year battery target readily achievable.
Applies only to Class A trophy assets with architectural restrictions. Back-of-house exits are unaffected. Configuration choice, not hardware modification.
assessments.mitigation: Specify IoT variant on back-of-house and stairwell exits only; Use mechanical-only on architecturally sensitive exits; Confirm specification with facilities manager

assessments.rationale: Primary sales friction. Commercial lessors run BACnet/IP or KNX BMS. EasyWave has no native interoperability. Gateway translation bridges the gap but adds cost.
assessments.mitigation: Deploy GfS Wireless BUS Gateway as BACnet/IP bridge; Map door events to BMS BACnet object layer; For standalone deployments, use GfS cloud dashboard independently

assessments.rationale: Institutional commercial landlords have budgets calibrated to building safety infrastructure. ~EUR 730/door is within standard range.
EU commercial buildings contain tenant-employees whose movement data may be attributable under GDPR. Legitimate interest basis is well-established for fire safety monitoring.
assessments.mitigation: Establish legitimate interest legal basis; Execute DPA with monitoring SaaS provider; Add exit monitoring to building privacy notice

assessments.rationale: Standard indoor commercial office environments require no elevated IP rating. IP45 outdoor variant available for exterior exits.
Office buildings combine emergency exit hardware with electromagnetic door holders and access control. Combined configurations require EN 13637 compliance. Standard design obligation for integrators.
assessments.mitigation: Specify fail-safe EM holder configurations only; Require EN 13637 compliance review in integrator specification; Keep IoT module supervisory-only
